# KSR Capital Sdn Bhd

> KSR Capital Sdn Bhd (SSM 764906-W) is a privately held Malaysian property investment and development firm incorporated on 8 March 2007. Headquartered in Kuala Lumpur, we specialise in five verticals: industrial land development, commercial land development, strata property management, CLQ setup and administration, and lifestyle venues (pickleball courts and event halls).

## Company

- Legal name: KSR Capital Sdn Bhd
- SSM registration: 764906-W
- Incorporated: 8 March 2007
- Registered address: No. 26510, Lot 10234, Mukim Gombak, Jalan Batu Caves, 68100 Batu Caves, Selangor Darul Ehsan, Malaysia
- Phone: 03-6186 7032
- Fax: 03-6186 6241
- Email: ksrcapitalsb@gmail.com
- Website: https://ksrcapital.my

## Five Expertise Verticals

1. **Industrial Land Development** — Design and delivery of industrial shoplots and complexes across the Klang Valley (Rinching, Sungai Besi)
2. **Commercial Land Development** — Commercial retail shoplots in prime urban locations (Kampung Baru, Kuala Lumpur)
3. **Strata Property Management** — End-to-end management of strata-titled properties
4. **CLQ Setup and Administration** — Certificate of Layak Quami (CLQ) setup and ongoing administration for property developments
5. **Lifestyle Venues** — Pickleball court facilities and event hall operations (Kampung Pandan, Pker Park, Dome Style Hall)

## Portfolio (6 Properties)

- **Double Storey Terrace Shoplot** — Kampung Baru, KL | 10 units | Commercial Retail
- **Industrial Shoplot** — Rinching, Selangor | 32 units | Industrial
- **Industrial Shoplot** — Sungai Besi, KL | 5-storey, 6 units | Industrial Complex
- **Pickleball Court** — Kampung Pandan, KL | 6 courts | Recreational Facility
- **Dome Style Hall** — Malaysia | Ongoing | Event & Community Venue
- **Pickleball Court** — Pker Park, Selangor | International standard | Recreational Facility

## Geographic Presence

Primary markets: Kuala Lumpur (Kampung Baru, Sungai Besi, Kampung Pandan) and Selangor (Rinching, Batu Caves, Pker Park).
